data.body:
## Description

**What**: Run /roadmap with full scrutiny and /brainstorm with value/effort scorer on real epics, confirming synchronized output quality
**Why**: End-to-end validation that the shared sub-workflows produce expected results in both skills
**Scope**:
- IN: Run /roadmap with scrutiny enabled, verify scrutiny output (gap analysis, scenario analysis, fidelity review present); run /brainstorm, verify priority differs from default P2
- OUT: Automated regression tests (covered by individual story TDD)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, /roadmap with full scrutiny produces equivalent scrutiny output to /brainstorm (gap analysis present, scenario analysis present, fidelity review verdict present)
  ← Satisfies: "run /roadmap with full scrutiny enabled on a real epic and confirm it produces scrutiny output equivalent to /brainstorm"
- When this story is complete, /brainstorm assigns a non-default priority to a real epic based on value/effort assessment
  ← Satisfies: "run /brainstorm on a real epic and confirm the output priority differs from the default P2"
